name: Artichoke Dip
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together all ingredients, except 1/4 cup Parmesan cheese.
2. Spread mixture in a 8 x 11 inch cake pan.
3. Sprinkle with remaining Parmesan cheese.
4. Bake at 350°F for about 30 minutes.
5. Serve with Ritz crackers.
6. Variation: Spread on bagel halves and bake until bubbly and golden.
